description: Animates translating the compass to a new center point without changing its radius or angle
utility: Reposition the compass center before drawing the next arc

arguments.name: newCenter
arguments.description: The new center position for the compass

examples.scenario: Move compass to (5,5) and draw a circle
Draw circles at two different centers with same radius
examples.expression: G = g2d(-10, 10, -10, 10); compassarc(G, point(G, -3, 0), radius(3)); compassmove(G, point(G, 3, 0)); compassarc(G)
